# Q-learning

Model-free reinforcement learning that updates action values with the Bellman optimality target.

<div class="algorithm-meta">
  <span>Reinforcement Learning</span>
  <span>rl, value iteration, tabular</span>
  <span>Mermaid</span>
</div>

## Flowchart

```mermaid
flowchart TD
    A[Initialize Q table] --> B[Observe current state]
    B --> C[Choose action]
    C --> D[Execute action]
    D --> E[Observe reward and next state]
    E --> F[Bellman update for Q]
    F --> G{Episode finished?}
    G -- No --> B
    G -- Yes --> H{More episodes?}
    H -- Yes --> B
    H -- No --> I[Return learned policy]
```


## Notes

- Often paired with epsilon-greedy exploration.
- Repeated Bellman updates drive Q-values toward the optimal action-value function.
